message:
Add WASI-NN bindings for local LLM inference

- Add src/wasi_nn.zig with WASI-NN API bindings for WasmEdge
- Add examples/ai/ with usage example and documentation
- Update README with WASI-NN in architecture diagram
- Add JavaScript ai module stub (requires WASI-NN plugin to enable)

WASI-NN support is disabled in default build to avoid import errors.
To enable: uncomment wasi_nn import in wasm_main.zig and run with:
  wasmedge --nn-preload default:GGML:AUTO:model.gguf

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ QuickJS JavaScript runtime with WASI support and WasmEdge AOT compilation for ru
 │  │  - process.stdin/stdout/stderr, env, argv           │  │
 │  │  - fetch (HTTP/HTTPS), child_process (spawnSync)    │  │
 │  │  - TLS 1.3 (X25519 + AES-GCM via std.crypto)        │  │
+│  │  - WASI-NN: Local LLM inference (Llama, etc.)       │  │
 │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
